title: Risto Miikkulainen
text: Home * People * Risto Miikkulainen Risto Miikkulainen [1] Risto Miikkulainen , a Finnish American computer scientist and professor at the University of Texas at Austin . He holds a Ph.D. in computer science from University of California, Los Angeles under Michael G. Dyer on the topic of distributed artificial neural networks . His research focuses on biologically-inspired computation such as neuroevolution , i.e. evolving neural networks with genetic algorithms for sequential decision tasks such as robotics , games , and artificial life .
